concerns.detail: Contains profanity (瞎jb) and insulting characterizations (走狗/lackeys) attacking individuals who delete content, constituting a personal attack rather than criticism of advising practices
concerns.excerpt: 我再警告在这儿瞎jb删内容和控评的走狗！

concerns.detail: Attempting to identify a specific female postdoc by soliciting/confirming her educational institution (JHU PhD), which serves as a lab-specific descriptor detailed enough to de-anonymize a private individual involved in a sensitive incident
